phase_name: Design Polish + Redesign Sweep (Impeccable Critique Remainder)

completed_tasks.name: Em-dash purge in drawer summaries + GIR titration grid
GIR paired HeroResults with display numerals
Morphine 48 px touch floor + range-hint parity
Drawer anchored above bottom nav (no gap)
Drawer + page clearance aligned to 3.5rem (was 4rem mismatch)
Drawer + clearance account for nav border-t (1px)
Mobile bottom-nav icons vertically centered (size 18, py-1)
PWA + meta description updated to current 5-calculator scope

remaining_tasks.name: Phase 43 — Release v1.13.0
remaining_tasks.context: Version bump package.json → 1.13.0, PROJECT.md Validated list update, final clinical quality gate (svelte-check + vitest + build + Playwright + axe in both themes)

remaining_tasks.name: Re-run /impeccable critique after the 14 follow-up commits soak
remaining_tasks.context: Last re-score moved 26→31. Recent fixes (em-dash purge, Amber rescope, HeroResult contract, RangedNumericInput unification, drawer polish) likely push it to 33-35. Schedule via /schedule for 2 weeks out.

human_actions_pending.action: Visual QA on a real iOS notched device
human_actions_pending.context: Drawer + nav clearance math uses env(safe-area-inset-bottom). The math is correct on flat-bottom Android and in browser DevTools mobile viewport, but the 1-px border alignment + safe-area composition should be eyeballed on an actual iPhone 14/15 in standalone PWA mode before v1.13 release.
registerType: 'prompt' means existing installed users see an Update prompt; manifest description change is captured at next install or after an Update Prompt acceptance.

decisions.decision: Identity-Inside Rule retained over single-accent consolidation
decisions.rationale: User clarified additional calculators are coming; need the identity-as-system pattern but scoped to inside-the-route only. DESIGN.md codifies this.

decisions.decision: D-08 sticky drawer ships default-ON (no QA flag)
decisions.rationale: User chose to ship the new layout immediately rather than gate behind localStorage flag.

decisions.decision: UAC/UVC arrows removed; UAC/UVC labels promoted at text-title font-black
decisions.rationale: User mid-flight design direction during Plan 3 checkpoint. Reverses the 42-UI-REVIEW D-05 third-cue restoration. Documented as a Phase 42 spec drift in 42-UI-SPEC.md amendment.

decisions.decision: AboutSheet xlsx source citations removed across all 4 calculators
decisions.rationale: Internal artifact, not user-facing provenance a clinician needs. Internal calc.ts xlsx comments preserved.

decisions.decision: RangedNumericInput shared component (textbox + slider) replaces 5 inline Slider blocks
decisions.rationale: User asked for unified weight UX (0.3-10 kg + slider) across all calculators; weight ranges in morphine + feeds were also normalized to match GIR/UAC-UVC.

decisions.decision: HeroResult contract enforces text-display element when using children snippet escape hatch
decisions.rationale: 3/5 calculators were bypassing the default contract; user locked the rule that any HeroResult must contain at least one text-display-sized element so the family's hero pattern stays recognizable.

decisions.decision: PWA + HTML meta description updated to cover all 5 currently-shipped calculators (drop PERT reference, drop em-dash)
decisions.rationale: Manifest description was stale from v1.0 era; user flagged.

next_action: Phase 43 (Release v1.13.0) — version bump + PROJECT.md Validated list + final gate sweep. All 14 follow-up commits since phase-42.1 closed are functional changes that v1.13 ships, plus the 6-plan phase work itself.
context_notes: Phase 42.1 closed at commit 1826069. Then 14 user-directed follow-up commits landed addressing post-critique findings + UX polish. Tests stable at 332/332 unit pass through the entire follow-up sequence (no regressions). Phase 43 is unblocked. Two open recommendations from the critique re-scoring (HeroResult variant codification beyond the rule; per-calculator wayfinding glyph) are forward-looking and not in 42.1 scope. Suggested next session: /gsd-discuss-phase 43 then plan + execute the release.
